title: lonchostoma pentandrum
intro: Lonchostoma pentandrum, also known as the Chinese dragon flower, is a plant species that belongs to the Apocynaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Lonchostoma pentandrum include its ability to treat fever, respiratory issues, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Traditional herbal preparations of Lonchostoma pentandrum include infusions and decoctions, which are often used to treat various ailments in traditional Chinese medicine.
